channel.title: Id_rsa on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Id_rsa on TLDRBins

item.title: SSH
item.description: Check SSH version openssh-server Generate SSH Key ssh-keygen #Set filename, leave passphase blank ./id_rsa #After Creation chmod 600 id_rsa Add SSH Access to Target cat id_rsa.pub #Copy and Paste to Target echo '<id_rsa.pub>' >> /home/user/.ssh/authorized_keys Connect to SSH with id_rsa ssh user@10.10.11.10 -i id_rsa # Fix: no matching host key type found. Their offer: ssh-rsa,ssh-dss ssh user@10.10.11.10 -i id_rsa -oHostKeyAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa Note: Always append a new line in id_rsa key
